title: remove code for internal energy

body: This PR adds mono (default to false) option to the remapping functionality. mono = true forces monotonicity in the remapping process.
title: add mono option to post-processing remap

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
The design docs specify that diffusion of momentum should have the form `@. -ᶜdivᵥ(ᶠρτ)/ᶜρ`. However, the `vertical_diffusion_boundary_layer_tendency!` currently has the form `@. ᶜdivᵥ(-ᶠτ)`, where `ᶠτ` at the bottom face boundary is given by `ᶠρτ[half]` (taken from SurfaceFluxes) divided by `ᶜρ[1]` (taken from the bottom cell center). This PR changes the momentum tendency so that it has the correct form. It also adds negations to the other diffusive tendencies, so that we do not need to negate the boundary conditions given by SurfaceFluxes. This is a prequel to #1447. 

## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->
- Change the tendency of momentum due to diffusion from `@. Yₜ.c.uₕ += ᶜdivᵥ(ᶠK_E * ᶠgradᵥ(Y.c.uₕ))` to `@. Yₜ.c.uₕ -= ᶜdivᵥ(-ᶠK_E * ᶠinterp(Y.c.ρ) * ᶠgradᵥ(Y.c.uₕ))) / Y.c.ρ`. Change `ᶜdivᵥ` so that it sets the value at the bottom boundary to `WVector(1) ⊗ UVVector(ρτxz, ρτyz)`, instead of `-WVector(1) ⊗ UVVector(ρτxz / ρ_bottom_center, ρτyz / ρ_bottom_center)`.
- Change the tendencies of energy and moisture due to diffusion from `@. tendency += ᶜdivᵥ(-ᶠflux)` to `@. tendency -= ᶜdivᵥ(ᶠflux)`, and negate their boundary conditions (i.e., use the unnegated boundary values from SurfaceFluxes).
- Remove the "negated boundary condition" cached fields `dif_flux_uₕ_bc`, `dif_flux_energy_bc`, and `dif_flux_ρq_tot_bc`.
- Rename `dif_flux_uₕ` to `dif_flux_ρuₕ`, and rename `dif_flux_energy` to `dif_flux_ρe_tot`.

<!---
Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
- followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

----
- [x] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Align vertical_diffusion_boundary_layer_tendency with design docs
